## evaluateScript() function

Evaluate arbitrary OmniJS source against the user's OmniFocus database.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function evaluateScript(input: EvaluateScriptInput): Promise<CliOutput<EvaluateScriptResult>>;
```

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;[CliOutput](./sdk.clioutput.md)<!-- -->&lt;[EvaluateScriptResult](./sdk.evaluatescriptresult.md)<!-- -->&gt;&gt;

A `CliOutput` whose `data` is the JSON-decoded return value of the script. The type is `unknown` because the user wrote arbitrary code.
